title: haplopappus squarrosus subsp. obtusus
intro: Haplopappus squarrosus subsp. obtusus, a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family, is also known as a rare or less common variant of the Haplopappus squarrosus plant. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's extracts and compounds have been shown to have potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant activity. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
